title: Add missing rejection tests for new input guards
description: Multiple guards were added in rounds 6-7 (reply_to, filter_space_id, add_channels name, add_members ID, update_member_roles ID) but no tests verify they reject empty inputs. Per CLAUDE.md test philosophy, each guard needs a test. Also add AppState tests for EphemeralUnavailable and ChatsDelta events which have no test coverage.
